name: Gaudet's Deep-Fried Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sour cream, mayonnaise, blue cheese dressing, and mustard together in a serving bowl. Set aside.
2. Dredge the pickles in bread crumbs.
3. Deep-fry the pickles in oil at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown.
4. Serve with sauce for dipping.
